welcome.title: Welcome to Metamates
welcome.tagline: Notes stay on your computer. AI helps you organize and act—results are written to files, not lost in chat.
welcome.introNoWorkspace: Metamates is a local knowledge workspace: browse notes on the left, edit in the center, collaborate with AI on the right. Choose a workspace folder to begin.
welcome.introReady: Your workspace is ready. AI on the right can read and write Markdown notes in this folder.
welcome.stepSetup1: On the left, click **Open workspace** and choose or create a notes folder
welcome.stepSetup2: On the right, **connect an AI assistant** (complete sign-in if prompted)
welcome.stepSetup3: Send your first message, or tap **`/today`** to generate today's plan
welcome.stepReady1: On the right, **pick an AI and send a message**
welcome.stepReady2: Try **`/today`** for a daily plan, or **`/intel`** to import a link or document
welcome.stepReady3: Open today's journal from the **calendar** on the left, or press **`Ctrl+N`**
welcome.stepAuth1: When the panel shows **sign-in required**, follow the prompt to authenticate your assistant
welcome.stepAuth2: After sign-in, send **`/today`** or any message to confirm it works
welcome.stepAuth3: You can also switch or install another assistant under **Settings → AI** (top right)
welcome.stepNoAgent1: No AI assistant is available yet
welcome.stepNoAgent2: Open **Settings → AI** to install or enable Gemini, Claude, or CodeBuddy
welcome.stepNoAgent3: Once connected, chat in the right panel or use slash commands
welcome.stepConnecting1: Connecting to your AI assistant — this usually takes a few seconds
welcome.stepConnecting3: Use the **microphone** next to the input for voice (mic permission required; Windows often needs network)
welcome.agentNeedsAuth: **Sign-in required.** Complete authentication in the panel on the right before sending messages or slash commands.
welcome.agentReady: **AI is ready.** Chat directly or use commands like `/today` and `/intel`.
welcome.agentNoAgent: No enabled AI assistant detected. Install or enable one under **Settings → AI**.
welcome.commandsBody:
| Command | Purpose |
|---------|--------|
| `/today` | Generate today's plan |
| `/closeday` | End-of-day review |
| `/intel` | Import a URL or document as intelligence |
| `/context` | Load project context |

See **?** (top right) for the full list.
welcome.tipsBody:
- **`Ctrl+P`** Command palette (new note, import intelligence, …)
- **`Ctrl+Shift+F`** Global search
- **`@`** Reference a file in chat
- **`[[note name]]`** Link notes together
- **Microphone** on the right for voice input (mic permission; Windows desktop often needs network)
